candidates.why: Component of revenue but not the main total; use as backup only if needed.
Represents the company’s total top-line revenue; best single REVT proxy.
Financial income, not operating revenue; not appropriate for REVT.
Interest income, not operating revenue; exclude for REVT.
Aggregate non-operating result; not revenue.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive Income - Attributable to Share premium
candidates.why: Part of comprehensive income, not revenue.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive Income - Attributable to Minority Interest - Total
candidates.why: Comprehensive income attribution, not revenue.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive Income before Minority Interest - Total
candidates.why: Comprehensive income subtotal, not revenue.
Balance sheet accrued revenue asset, not the flow of revenue itself.

variables.notes: Selected the main top-line revenue line; other candidates are components or non-operating/comprehensive items.

candidates.why: Best match for cost of goods sold / cost of sales.
Likely contains both production and overhead payroll; ambiguous for pure COGS, so not chosen as primary.
General operating overhead, more appropriate for SG&A than COGS.
Net operating figure, not a direct cost-of-sales line.
Inventory level, not period expense COGS.
Prepaid assets, not COGS.
Liability, not the COGS flow.

variables.notes: Mapped COGS to the explicit production-related cost line "Cost of materials".

candidates.why: This is revenue, not an SG&A expense; excluded per SG&A rules.
Share-based compensation is a classic SG&A component.
General operating expenses that are overhead in nature; good SG&A component bucket.

candidates.row_label: Brands, Patents, Trademarks, Marketing & Artistic Intangibles - Gross
candidates.why: Balance sheet intangible asset, not an SG&A expense line.

candidates.row_label: Amortization of Brands, Patents, Trademarks, Marketing & Artistic Intangibles - Supplemental
candidates.why: Amortization is excluded from SG&A per instructions (D&A should be excluded).

candidates.row_label: Brands, Patents, Trademarks, Marketing & Artistic Intangibles - Accumulated Amortization & Impairment
candidates.why: Balance sheet contra-asset; not an SG&A flow.

variables.notes: Chose SG&A expense components and excluded revenue and D&A/intangible amortization lines, per SG&A rules.

candidates.row_label: Amortization of Capitalized Research & Development Expenses - Supplemental
candidates.why: Directly related to R&D; best available proxy for R&D expense given capitalization.
R&D asset balance, not period expense.

candidates.row_label: Research & Development Costs - Accumulated Amortization & Impairment
candidates.why: Accumulated amortization on the balance sheet, not the current-period expense line.

candidates.row_label: Research & Development Costs - Net - Balancing value
candidates.why: Balancing/net asset figure, not an expense.

final_choice.row_label: Amortization of Capitalized Research & Development Expenses - Supplemental

variables.notes: Mapped XRD to the specific amortization of capitalized R&D expense as the best R&D-related flow.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense - Net of Capitalized Interest
candidates.why: Primary interest expense line; best match for XINT.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
candidates.why: Interest on lease liabilities; included as secondary interest expense line.
Earnings per share metric related to non-controlling interest, not interest expense.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental disclosure of lease interest; likely duplicative of the main lease interest line.
Equity line, not an interest expense.

final_choice.row_label: Interest Expense - Net of Capitalized Interest
Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities

variables.notes: Provided a priority list of interest expense lines, preferring the general interest expense, then lease-specific interest.

candidates.why: Income statement attribution, not the balance sheet equity level.
Residual/other equity component; less precise than the explicit parent-equity total.
Component category, not the main equity total attributable to owners.

candidates.row_label: Equity attributable to equity holders of the parent
candidates.why: Explicit book equity attributable to owners; ideal for BE excluding NCI.
Includes non-controlling interests; should be avoided for BE when parent-equity line exists.

final_choice.row_label: Equity attributable to equity holders of the parent

variables.notes: Used the balance sheet line explicitly giving equity attributable to equity holders of the parent, excluding non-controlling interests.

candidates.why: EPS measure, not the balance sheet minority interest amount.
Balance sheet minority interest / non-controlling interests; ideal for MIB.
Income statement attribution; could be a backup but balance sheet amount is preferred for denominator.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive Income - Attributable to Minority Interest - Total
candidates.why: Comprehensive income attribution, not the equity balance.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive Income before Minority Interest - Total
candidates.why: Total comprehensive income before NCI, not the NCI balance itself.

variables.notes: Mapped MIB primarily to the balance sheet "Non-controlling interests" line, with the income statement minority interest total as a secondary fallback.
